title: InferenceResult
description: Schema for anomaly detection results stored in Redis and returned via API. Contains both Stage 1 (unsupervised) and Stage 2 (supervised) output formats.

job_id.description: Reference to the originating inference job

status.description: Current status of the inference job

completed_at.description: Timestamp when inference completed (null if pending/processing)

stage.description: Pipeline stage that produced this result

anomaly_score.description: Overall anomaly score. 0.0 = definitely normal, 1.0 = definitely anomalous. Threshold typically set at 0.5 for binary classification.

confidence.description: Model confidence in the prediction. Low confidence samples are candidates for active learning.

heatmap_available.description: Whether spatial anomaly heatmap was generated

heatmap_key.description: Redis key or S3 path to heatmap data (if available)

feature_distance.description: Distance in feature space from normal distribution (PatchCore/PaDiM)

stage2_output.description: Stage 2 (Supervised) specific outputs - requires labeled training data

embedding_distance.description: Distance from decision boundary in contrastive embedding space

active_learning.description: Active learning metadata for sample selection

uncertainty_score.description: Uncertainty measure for AL sampling. High uncertainty = valuable for labeling.

in_labeling_pool.description: Whether this sample is currently in the active learning pool

labeled.description: Whether this sample has been labeled by an expert

defect_description.description: Human-readable defect description produced by the VLM (null if no VLM call was made or image was clean).

defect_location.description: Spatial description of the defect location from the VLM (e.g. 'upper-left quadrant').

gpt4v_reasoning.description: Legacy one-sentence reasoning string from the GPT-4V detector. Preserved for backward compatibility; new code should use natural_description.

product_class.description: Routed product category for Stage 1 (one of the trained PatchCore categories) or 'unknown' for zero-shot fallback.

product_confidence.description: Confidence of the VLM product identification (0.0-1.0).

natural_description.description: Operator-facing single-sentence defect description from the VLM router's describe_defect call.

defect_severity.description: Severity bucket assigned by the VLM. Null when no defect was described.

defect_type.description: Defect-type label from the VLM (e.g. 'scratch', 'crack', 'contamination'). Separate from Stage-2 multi-class output.

routing_reason.description: Which branch of the router fired. Records made before the router existed have this as null.

vlm_model_used.description: Which OpenAI model was invoked for this result, if any.

vlm_api_cost_estimate_usd.description: Rough USD cost estimate for the VLM calls that produced this result. Sum of per-call estimates.

stage2_verdict.description: Stage 2 supervised refiner outcome. Null when Stage 2 did not run.

stage2_defect_class.description: Defect class named by Stage 2 (null if rejected or uncertain).
